scenarios.title: Sparse Retrieval Workflows
scenarios.when_to_read: Tasks involving SPLADE sparse lexical retrieval, Hydra train/index/retrieve workflows, HF hard-negative training, reranking, Anserini export, pruning, BEIR, or PISA planning.
scenarios.role: Routes SPLADE repository tasks to focused guidance for classic Hydra pipelines, HF Trainer/reranking, model/data APIs, and export/pruning/evaluation.
scenarios.read_when: User mentions SPLADE, splade.*, SParse Lexical AnD Expansion, Hydra configs, naver/splade models, Anserini SPLADE vectors, pytrec_eval, BEIR, PISA, static pruning, hard negatives, or RankT5/monoT5 reranking.
scenarios.best_for: Constructing safe SPLADE commands, validating SPLADE data layouts, inspecting SPLADE APIs without downloads, diagnosing dependency/config errors, and planning export/evaluation/pruning workflows.
scenarios.avoid_when: The task is generic dense retrieval unrelated to SPLADE, a different retrieval repo is named, or the user only needs general Hydra/Hugging Face help with no SPLADE-specific signals.
scenarios.selection_guidance: Choose `splade` for SPLADE-specific retrieval, training, data, export, pruning, or evaluation tasks; then route to the sub-skill whose entry point matches the user's command/API/dependency signal.
